blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Stargazing / Astronomy Observation Streak
blue_ocean_niches.reasoning: No dedicated stargazing habit streak app. Star Chart is an astronomy guide, not streak accountability. r/Astronomy 2.1M + r/astrophotography 2.3M. Genuine gap.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Gardening / Plant Care Streak
blue_ocean_niches.reasoning: GrowIt is garden planner, PlantMe is plant ID. NO dedicated daily gardening habit streak. r/gardening 7.2M + r/houseplants 3.1M. Clear blue ocean.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Drawing / Sketching Practice Streak
blue_ocean_niches.reasoning: ibis Paint X / Adobe Fresco / Procreate are canvas tools, not streak apps. Drawing ▫ is a tool. No streak-first daily art practice app. r/learnart 1.1M + r/drawing 2.9M. Gap confirmed.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Handwriting / Penmanship / Calligraphy Streak
blue_ocean_niches.reasoning: Calligraphy Art Maker is a drawing tool. MyScript Notes is OCR. No streak-first handwriting practice accountability. r/Handwriting 430K + r/fountainpens 480K. Clear BO.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily / Weekly Film Photography Practice Streak
blue_ocean_niches.reasoning: Lapse, Kamon, OldRoll are disposable/vintage camera filter apps. NOT streak accountability. r/analog 700K + r/filmphotography 530K. Film photography streak gap confirmed.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Podcast Learning / Educational Audio Streak
blue_ocean_niches.reasoning: Apple Podcasts/Spotify/Pocket Casts are players with zero streak accountability. Snipd is AI clip saver. No dedicated daily podcast STREAK app. r/podcasts 3.4M. Clear BO.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Documentary / Educational Video Streak
blue_ocean_niches.reasoning: Zero dedicated documentary habit streak app. Dailymotion is a video platform. r/Documentaries 2.1M. Extremely clear blue ocean — no competitors found.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Weekly Hair Care / Treatment Routine Streak
blue_ocean_niches.reasoning: Great Clips/StyleSeat are salon booking apps. Hair Snap is a style scanner. NO dedicated hair care routine streak app. r/NaturalHair 1.1M + r/curlyhair 950K. Clear blue ocean.

soft_competition_niches.label: Daily Birdwatching / Birding Life List Streak
soft_competition_niches.reasoning: Birda exists as birding sightings log — NOT streak-first. Picture Bird and Birdbuddy are species ID. Low traction dedicated app = soft competition.

soft_competition_niches.label: Daily Book Summary / Non-Fiction Reading Streak
soft_competition_niches.reasoning: Bookly and Book Tracker are reading LOG apps with some streak features. Atoms from Atomic Habits has gamification. Not streak-FIRST but overlap exists. Soft competition.

soft_competition_niches.label: Daily Posture Check / Alignment Practice Streak
soft_competition_niches.reasoning: Gentler Streak is fitness streak tracker (not posture-specific). No dedicated posture-check streak app. Software-only posture accountability is under-served.

occupied_niches.reasoning: Me+ Lifestyle Routine is a MAJOR competitor with 235K ratings. Explicitly tracks routine streaks. OCCUPIED — do not build.
